blogs.title: HTML
blogs.description: Syntax: Placed inside the opening tag, like <html lang="en">.Accessibility: Helps screen readers pronounce words correctly for visually impaired users.SEO: Helps Google show your site to the right audience based on their language.Translation: Triggers browser prompts to translate pages automatically.Codes: Uses standard short codes (e.g., es for Spanish, fr for French).
blogs.author: Vaishnavi Bagde

blogs.title: CSS
blogs.description: CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) is the code used to design and style the visual layout of a webpage. It controls colors, fonts, spacing, positioning, and responsiveness across different device screens.
blogs.author: Vaishnavi Bagde

blogs.title: JAVA Script
blogs.description: An HTML tag represents an image, which you can control in JavaScript by accessing its element properties like src (source URL) or alt (description) to change images dynamically.
blogs.author: Vaishnavi Bagde

blogs.title: Bootstrap
blogs.description: Bootstrap 5 is a powerful, open-source frontend framework used to build responsive, mobile-first websites quickly. It provides pre-designed HTML, CSS, and JavaScript components like buttons, grids, forms, and navigation bars.
blogs.author: Vaishnavi Bagde

blogs.title: React js
blogs.description: Component-Based: Built using isolated, reusable code blocks.Virtual DOM: Updates only changed elements for fast performance.Declarative: You describe how the UI should look, and React handles the updates.Maintained by Meta: Backed by Facebook and a huge open-source community.
blogs.author: Vaishnavi Bagde

blogs.title: Next js
blogs.description: Next.js is an open-source, full-stack JavaScript framework built on top of React that enables developers to build fast, SEO-friendly web applications. Maintained by Vercel, it eliminates complex build configurations and provides out-of-the-box architecture for production-ready frontend and backend features
blogs.author: Vaishnavi Bagde
